use_cases: Animated background visual for hero sections and landing pages
Ambient decorative element for dashboard or landing page layouts
Aesthetic audio visualizer placeholder for music or media applications
Engaging visual backdrop for tech product presentations
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated wave visualizer featuring multiple layered wave lines with dynamic color intensity shifts. The component renders overlapping sine wave animations on a dark background with neon cyan/purple gradients that pulse and morph over time. It automatically resizes to fill the viewport and provides a continuous ambient animation suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, or decorative accents in tech and SaaS applications.
